seoTitle: New Italy vs New Lambton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Italy and New Lambton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Italy vs New Lambton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Italy and New Lambton.
heading: New Italy vs New Lambton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Italy, New South Wales and New Lambton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Italy has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to New Lambton (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Italy or New Lambton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Italy has a flood risk score of 24/100, while New Lambton scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Italy scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. New Lambton scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Italy or New Lambton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Italy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
